reviews.review_description: But ima refund to download cooking clash still best bar game ever

Love the art style so much plus the gameplay is just very entertaining and I can easily play for an hour plus. Played the demo and immediately purchased afterwards. Would be cool to see another version of this game where it’s different types of “monsters” like vampires and werewolfs

I came here straight from Help Wanted2 food service lol like some of you. This isn't scary at all, just cartoony fun but the concept is very much the same. Fend off minor threats and pests as you hustle up food and drinks for impatient customers. Varied mechanics, well thought out play space, a store to buy cosmetics and weapons. The 30 days campaign is really there almost as a tutorial, because there is a fantastically replayable endless mode!!! For those who want to chill, there is a customizable freestyle mode. About everything you could ask from a tasking game. Nice job, devs!

developer_response.body:
Thanks a ton for the detailed feedback! 🙌

We’re so glad you’re enjoying Zombie Bar Simulator — from fending off pests to juggling food and drinks 😄
It’s awesome to hear that the campaign, endless mode, and freestyle mode hit the mark and keep things replayable and fun. Your support and kind words mean a lot to us! 🍔🧟‍♂️🎉

~VRF Team

reviews.review_description: This game is the best I have fun making burgers and everything

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much! 😄

We’re thrilled you’re having fun in Zombie Bar Simulator, making burgers and everything else 🍔🧟‍♂️
Glad the game is giving you a great time! 🎉

~VRF Team

reviews.review_description: I found this game to be great fun and probably one of the games I will reinstall and come back to. I’m a casual gamer in my 40s and find myself relishing games that are simple to pick up and learn and give me the opportunity to switch off, relax, and enjoy challenges that don’t melt my middle-aged brain to a great extent. There is a good range of recipes here with a fun bar atmosphere and I found the progressive difficulty level to be just right for my limited skills. If you are a fan of the bar-tending genre definitely worth a try!

First, the game plops you into a big bar room with no directions. I thought I was supposed to be behind the bar. So I ran around for a while until I jammed up against the bar as close as I could, to try and get behind the bar... nothing. I turned around and there was the menu in my face. Couldn't interact with it, so I went to the side of the bar and sniped the start button, barely, which fixed the problem of me being outside of the bar. Played for a while to get the feel of the game. Kind of just got bored... 

Got off, came here to read other reviews and ooooooooh man. So one person in the reviews had the exact same experience I had, but the devs responded to them basically calling them a liar, saying there's no error like that as per their QA department or from the programmers. Weird, so I guess we shouldn't trust our lying eyes. Aaanyways, another 1 star review the dev reaponded to by saying that person's opinion was "diametrically opposed to everyone elses"... like that person's opinion didn't matter. No. Even if I did like this game, which I didn't, I would never support this developer ever again. And people think only AAA devs are bad... sheesh.

developer_response.body:
Hello
We are worried about your anger. Join our Discrord so that we can talk about the problem you are facing. For us, as for you, games are a great passion but also work. Every day, the multi-person teams at VR Factory Games try to create the most satisfying games for players and then develop them. In fact, we have a testing team of several people and every time if there is a bug we try to reproduce and fix it. If after a few days we can't reproduce it means it's a unique problem that occurs once in very many thousands of installations which doesn't mean it doesn't matter and we don't care.
We believe that you will find a moment to talk about the problem. As a studio manager I am very sorry that you have such an opinion - every opinion matters to us. Have fun playing VR games! Best Slake CEO VR Factory Games

reviews.review_description: I’m only on day 2 and whenever i try to learn a recipe i can’t grab anything or whenever the foods done i can’t put it on the plate and continue with the game.

developer_response.body:
Hi! Thanks for sharing your feedback. 
It sounds like you’re having trouble interacting with items and completing recipes. We’d love to understand this better – feel free to join our Discord  and share more details about what’s happening. Your input really helps us improve the player experience!

reviews.review_description: I love zombie games so now I’m cooking for them…SWEET! What else can I ask for. LOL
I feel like a master at making drinks and a chef at the same time this is my favorite game
It’s so fun it can entertain me for hours Maybe days if I could so good 5/5 definitely worth buying.
I wanted this game forever and finally I finally got it
I love it. Very fun and casual way to relax. I'd like to see more levels and have access to the holiday versions.
It's so much fun, The new game is very cool
I do like the game. I just think it's a bit small and repetitive. More maps would be cool and also frequent updates

It took me some time to get the pace for most recipes, it can be chaotic but I like that. I love that you can practice recipes because otherwise it would be very hard to play. Shoutout to the Youtuber Xifo for gifting me this game.
The graphics in the game still look like it was from the Quest 1. Please update the game. The screenshots and video are from the PCVR and not the Quest version buyer beware.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your suggestion, we will keep it in mind for future updates :)

~VR Factory Team

reviews.review_description: I really think VR Factory games crushed it with zombie bar because I think it is really creative to make this game spooky and fun and really recommend this for newer people to VR because this game has a of of levels and there is a next game if you finish zombie bar VR which is bartender VR which I have really heard good things about and I’m definitely going to try that soon but in conclusion, everything is cool the skins the guns and just being creative as a bartender and just having fun serving interesting drinks and food in a very cool environment.￼￼
This game is simple yet awesome! And very fun to play i enjoyed it very much. Please continue on the updates, i cannot wait for more!! Appreciate you guys :)

My first big issue is with the 'practice mode', where you're supposed to learn the recipe. The game doesn't register what you're doing half the time, and by the time you get halfway done, you've already 'failed' because your zombified customer has gotten impatient. Isn't the point of a practice mode to be able to PRACTICE? This mode shouldn't have a timer.

Secondly, the zombified customers that do come don't give you nearly enough time to get their orders done, especially if the game is being glitchy (which it will be), or if you have multiple customers (which turns into 'pick one, tick the others off'. And this isn't even including the 'enemy' showing up basically every round of customers. Enjoy burning your food trying to take care of him, and then enjoy your customers storming off... or taking care of the food, and having the customers scared off.

Third, if you are colorblind at all, good freaking luck with the drinks! The blue/purple and yellow/green are impossible for me to tell apart as Protanopic person, and I can't see an option to make the game more colorblind friendly. This ties in with the time issue too -- even if the developer put images on the bottles on the order, by the time you compared it, the timer would already be at 'you won't have enough time left'.

I bought this game because I love anything Zombies, and Startenders got me into the genre. That said, for me, this game is a HARD pass. Sorry, developers, but I'll let this one lie in its own grave.

developer_response.body: Hello. Thank you for expressing your opinion about our game in such detail. We are sorry that you are struggling with color blindness. You are right, we do not have a special mode for people with color blindness. As an indy studio, we do not have the ability to prepare the game for hundreds of different limitations, despite our best efforts. We understand your disappointment. Best regards Team VR Factory Games

reviews.review_description: Why is there a timer move it it’s annoying. I hate it.🤬🤬🤬

~VR Factory Team

The game has hand tracking and mixed reality mode. Have fun with it. Team VR Factory Games

reviews.review_description:
I was on this game for HOURS!! Finally I finished all the challenges but would like to start over. Is there a way to reset the game??

Anyhoo.... HIGHLY RECOMMEND!

developer_response.body: Hey there! We are glad to hear that you enjoyed Zombie Bar Simulator so much that you want to have another round! That's the spirit of a true zombie bartender 😉 Sadly there is no in-game option to reset your progress, but you can still replay all the missions by selecting them one by one in the game's menu. We hope this will be enough to let you relive the adventures you are looking for!

reviews.review_description: Purchased this game when it was called horror bar a little  glitchy but I loved it was my fav name now changed to zombie bar simulator and it’s glitchy and there’s a bunch of pinchy hand/fingers all over the place very distracting and hard to enjoy play. Please resolve thanks!

developer_response.body: Hello, Krys! Thank you for your report and your suggestions.  We will do our best to identify the glitches you mentioned and take a closer look at the grab markers, to make sure they don't interfere with gameplay. We're sorry  to hear you think our game only deserves one star, but at the same time we are glad that it was your favorite game - we hope that in the future you will give Zombie Bar Simulator another chance and this time the game will bring you more joy. Cheers!

reviews.review_description: I enjoy the PC version called HORROR BAR VR so much I also bought this Quest version. I just wonder why they renamed the game for this version? The game is always a game I return to for gaming sessions. I have only one neat thing I wish the development team would add into the game. It would be amazing to add in a social feature where online friends and others with game could hang out in the bar and watch you serve customers and also make them  menu items. The idea of that just sounds like so fun if it was added into the game.

developer_response.body: Hey there, YourGEEKYNeighbor! We are glad that you had a good time with our game in both the PCVR and standalone versions. As for the new name of the title, we thought that Zombie Bar Simulator better reflects the content and nature of the game 😉 The social features you mentioned sound really cool, so we'll be sure to check what possibilities we have in this area. Cheers!

reviews.review_description:
It's really fun! Despite the name, it isn't a scary game. It's significantly better than the other cooking games (Clash of Chefs looking at you) because there is variety in what you can do. The game starts picking up the pace like 8 levels in. The environment and characters were well designed and I LIKE the fact that you have to kill creatures that get in your way (unlike other reviewers who may have complained) because it is a horror bar after all.

 The only part of the gameplay I have feedback for is that some items disappear if you put it down the "wrong" way. For example, you cant keep the top bun on an empty plate, it disappears if there is not already a patty laid down on it and I think a few burger patties went awol when I put them on the grill. It would also be nice to have some music choices.

A possible idea in the future is maybe to add an extra environment/building upgrade as an option. Though I do like that they already have theme updates for Halloween and Christmas.

I'm excited to try out the devs regular Bartending VR game!

developer_response.body: Thank you for receiving the game so positively and leaving your references. Thank you not only for the super ratings but for sharing your ideas for the development of the game. You mentioned our game Bartender VR Simulator - you are welcome. And soon our next game www.workshopsimulatorvr.com With joy and passion we create games for you! Enjoy Team VR Factory Games

reviews.review_description: If you're a fan of games like cooking dash, you'll love this one! These Zombies are Demanding, but for some reason, I've always loved those high stress multi-tasking games that keep you on your toes. Even with the stressful atmosphere, I found myself laughing along the way. The Zombies are more adorable than they are scary, so if you're not a big fan of horror games, you don't have to worry about being scared with this one. With so many recipes to learn, this game will keep you interested and makes the price for the experience worthwhile. Check out my YT channel for video reviews: That VR Girl

developer_response.body: Thank you for such a good review and broad description of our game. We are glad that you have fun playing Horror Bar VR Best Slawek CEO VR Factory Games

reviews.review_description:
I love playing this game it’s typically the type of cooking or service games I enjoy playing. One of the best VR games I’ve played in a while.

BUT
1. It’s glitchy. I’ve had multiple instances that the order is ready and I place it in front of the zombie but 
nothing happens. So I eventually loose the zombie.
2. Burgers disappeared sometimes while I was flipping it without it being burnt or anything. The burger patty also gets stuck sideways on the grill and sometimes that would lead to the patty disappearing.
3. I’ve had the crab boiling station not let me cook any carbs the whole game.
4. There should be more days added. I finished all the days in two days. There is the endless mode BUT it doesn’t give you the same thrill as the day by day game mode.
5. Also it would be nice if when the zombie grabs the item, that it actually appears in their hand as they walk away. It just looks like their grabbing at air.

Cheers Slawek CEO VR Factory Games

reviews.review_description:
This game is pretty good, it can get repetitive after a while. i haven’t played too much of it just yet so i thought i’d give my initial thoughts.

It is still petty buggy, i didn’t see any kind of option for a tutorial or anything so i was kind of just put in the game and had to figure it out by myself so maybe tutorials would be useful. i also had some stuff disappear on me for absolutely no reason when i was making food, i had 4 customers in a row that barely give me any time to make anything before the timer ran out.

i’m not really a fan of the whole enemy in a bar thing? where some character is upsetting everyone and you have to shoot them? i couldn’t figure that out at first and it just started to get annoying.

it just needs some bug fixes here and there and i think that haptic feedback should really be added, it feels strange playing a game where the controllers don’t vibrate.

anyway with a few bug fixes and updates i think this could be a great game, if you want to try it for yourself you can use my link to get 25% off!

https://tinyurl com/yc8277w9

(just remove the space and add a . )

developer_response.body: Thanks for the positive feedback. Thank you for your comments which we will take in the development of the game. Have fun playing Horror Bar VR. Best Slawek CEO VR Factory Games

reviews.review_description: It’s fun but only has 30 levels. There was no tutorial and it took me awhile to figure it out. Tried reaching out on Facebook for help but never got a response. This could easily be a 5 star game with more day levels, a helpful tutorial for new players, more upgrades to the kitchen items and a way to report bugs (like for me, I can’t cook crab in the pot). There is endless play, but why do it without earning fake cash to upgrade your kitchen or adding/changing food or drinks.

developer_response.body:
Hello Ariel! 

We're glad to hear that you find our game fun and that you would like it to have more levels 🤩 Regarding the crab issue, we have sent you a video showing how to put it in the pot - we hope it will be helpful! Thank you for your suggestions regarding the tutorial for new players and more upgrades - we will be sure to discuss them with our team. Cheers!

reviews.review_description:
I first saw Horror Bar on The Facebook group Total VR Gaming and decided to give it a look! I'm so glad I did because i have so many positive things to say, it's absolutely fantastic. It's easily become one of my daily plays. Such a fun and wacky concept!

The graphics are superb, whoever is doing your environmental art deserves a raise! The textures are beautiful, it's all so smooth and very easy on the eye. It truly feels like the characters are really in front of you! The feeling of immersion is incredible, i could play for hours and i have!

I love the variety of characters, some had me laughing out loud, you have done a great job of filling the game full of great humorous touches like hitting the fish with the mallet. All in all i will continue to play Horror Bar for a long time to come and I'm really looking forward to future updates. The possibilities are pretty endless with regard to learning new recipes and adding more grizzly ingredients!

Congratulations devs! You have made an excellent game.

developer_response.body: Our jaws dropped as we read so many beautiful words about our game! Thank you for appreciating not only the concept of the game but also for appreciating the quality of the game. For us, every aspect of the game was and is important. See how this game was created https://youtu.be/jnJJg-JE0Mc We would love to meet you and establish direct contact. My email is slawek.matul@vrfactory.pro  Best Slawek CEO VR Factory Games

reviews.review_description: This game is hilarious.  The eye balls, chicken feet, etc. all make this a really fun experience.  I could pay this for hours. ♡

developer_response.body: Hey, thank you for your feedback. We are so glad that you've liked it! 🧠
